projectName: MASH E-Commerce - Review & Rating System Complete Implementation
description: Complete end-to-end review and rating system for products and mushroom growers with Sanity CMS integration, admin moderation, seller responses, and real-time Firebase synchronization

existingFoundation.firebaseService: src/lib/firebase/reviews.ts - Full CRUD, voting, flagging, real-time subscriptions
existingFoundation.types: src/types/reviews.ts - FirestoreReview, CreateReviewInput, UpdateReviewInput, FlagReviewInput, RatingStats, UseReviewsReturn
existingFoundation.hook: src/hooks/useFirebaseReviews.ts - Real-time hook with CRUD, voting, flagging
components: src/components/reviews/FirebaseReviewSection.tsx - Full review section with stats, sort, pagination
src/components/reviews/ReviewForm.tsx - Zod-validated form with star rating
existingFoundation.sanitySchema: studio/src/schemaTypes/documents/review.ts - Full schema with moderation, flagging, admin response fields
pageIntegrations: src/app/grower/[id]/page.tsx - FirebaseReviewSection on grower pages (ALREADY INTEGRATED)
existingFoundation.sellerDashboard: 15+ pages exist under src/app/(seller)/seller/ - dashboard, orders, products, stock, etc.
existingFoundation.tests: 39 tests for FirebaseReviewSection, full service tests - 1478 total tests passing

successMetrics.security: All Sanity write operations server-side with SANITY_API_WRITE_TOKEN
successMetrics.build: npm run build passes with zero errors
successMetrics.tests: All test suites pass with 0 failures
successMetrics.documentation: All new patterns documented in progress.txt

stories.title: Review Moderation Service - Firebase Backend Functions
acceptanceCriteria: Add moderateReview(reviewId, adminId, action, reason?) to FirebaseReviewService
Add addAdminResponse(reviewId, adminId, response) to FirebaseReviewService
Add getAllReviews(filters?) that fetches ALL reviews (not just approved) for admin
Add getReviewsByStatus(status) for filtering by pending/approved/rejected/flagged
Add deleteReviewAsAdmin(reviewId, adminId, reason) with audit logging
Add clearFlags(reviewId, adminId) to reset flag count after admin review
All functions validate admin permission (check userId matches admin)
All moderation actions write to moderationLog subcollection with timestamp
Update FirestoreReview type to include moderatedBy, moderatedAt, sellerResponse fields
Unit tests for all new service functions

technicalNotes.pattern: Follow existing toggleHelpfulVote/flagReview patterns with getDoc + updateDoc

stories.title: useReviewModeration Hook
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/hooks/useReviewModeration.ts custom hook
Fetch all reviews with real-time onSnapshot (no status filter for admin view)
Provide moderateReview(reviewId, action, reason?) function
Provide addAdminResponse(reviewId, response) function
Provide deleteReviewAsAdmin(reviewId, reason) function
Support filtering by: status, targetType, rating range, date range, keyword search
Pagination support with configurable page size
Loading and error states
Stats: total count by status, average rating, total reviews
Toast notifications on success/error for all actions

technicalNotes.pattern: Follow useFirebaseReviews.ts pattern with onSnapshot subscription
technicalNotes.auth: Uses useAuth() to get current admin user ID for audit trail
technicalNotes.filters: Client-side filtering since Firestore composite index limitations

stories.title: Admin Review Dashboard Page
acceptanceCriteria: Create route at src/app/(seller)/seller/reviews/page.tsx
Page header with title, total review count, and average rating summary
Tab bar: All Reviews | Pending | Approved | Flagged | Rejected
Each tab shows count badge (e.g., Pending (5))
Review cards in list/grid with: reviewer name, rating stars, content preview, target name, status badge, date
Click review card opens moderation modal (REVIEW-004)
Search box for keyword search across review content
Filter dropdowns: Target Type (product/grower), Rating (1-5), Date Range
Pagination: 20 per page with prev/next buttons
Loading skeleton states, error state with retry, empty state messages
Mobile responsive - stack filters vertically on mobile

technicalNotes.layout: Follows existing seller dashboard layout pattern (see seller/orders/page.tsx)
technicalNotes.roleCheck: Check user role is ADMIN or SELLER via useAuth()

stories.title: Review Moderation Modal
acceptanceCriteria: Create ReviewModerationModal component using shadcn Dialog
Display full review: rating stars, title, full content, all images, reviewer info
Display target info: product/grower name with link
Display review metadata: date, status, helpful count, flag count
If flagged: show flag reasons list and reporter count
Action buttons: Approve (green), Reject (red), Delete (destructive)
Reject requires reason selection: spam, inappropriate, fake, offensive, other
Admin Response textarea (max 500 chars) with character counter
Save Response button stores adminResponse and adminResponseDate in Firestore
Success/error toast notifications on all actions
Modal closes on successful action
Confirmation dialog for Delete action (Are you sure?)

technicalNotes.ui: shadcn Dialog + Tabs + Select + Textarea + Button
technicalNotes.validation: Reject requires reason, Response requires min 10 chars

stories.title: Firebase to Sanity Sync API Route
acceptanceCriteria: Create API route POST /api/reviews/sync-to-sanity
Accept { reviewId, reviewData } in request body
Use SANITY_API_WRITE_TOKEN (server-side only, never exposed to client)
Map Firebase review fields to Sanity review schema fields
Handle product reference: query Sanity for product by _id matching targetId
Handle grower reference: query Sanity for grower by _id or slug matching targetId
Use createOrReplace mutation to create/update Sanity document
Store firebaseId in Sanity doc for reverse lookup
Implement retry logic: 3 attempts with 1s/2s/4s backoff
Log sync errors to console and return detailed error response
Return { success: boolean, sanityId: string, syncedAt: string }
Unit tests for mapping logic and API route

technicalNotes.securityPattern: Follow src/app/api/seller/stock/adjust/route.ts pattern for server-side Sanity writes
technicalNotes.mapping: targetType=product -> _ref to product._id, targetType=grower -> _ref to grower._id

stories.title: Sanity to Firebase Sync API Route
acceptanceCriteria: Create API route POST /api/reviews/sync-from-sanity
Accept { sanityId } or Sanity webhook payload in request body
Fetch Sanity review document by _id using read token
Find corresponding Firestore review via stored firebaseId field
Sync status, adminResponse, adminResponseDate from Sanity to Firestore
Last-write-wins: compare updatedAt timestamps, newer wins
Return { success: boolean, firebaseId: string, fieldsUpdated: string[] }
Handle missing Firestore document gracefully (log warning, skip)
Unit tests for sync logic

technicalNotes.webhookSupport: Optional Sanity webhook can POST to this endpoint on review update
technicalNotes.conflictResolution: Compare updatedAt timestamps, most recent wins

stories.title: Auto-Sync on Review Submission and Moderation
acceptanceCriteria: After ReviewForm creates review in Firestore, call /api/reviews/sync-to-sanity
After admin moderateReview action, call /api/reviews/sync-to-sanity to update Sanity
After admin addAdminResponse, sync response to Sanity
All sync calls are fire-and-forget (don't block user interaction)
Log sync failures to console but don't show error to user
Add sync status indicator in admin dashboard (synced/pending/failed icon per review)
Unit test: verify fetch calls are made after review actions

technicalNotes.integration: Add fetch('/api/reviews/sync-to-sanity') calls in useFirebaseReviews and useReviewModeration hooks
technicalNotes.fireAndForget: Use .catch(console.error) pattern - never await sync in user flow
technicalNotes.indicator: Add syncStatus field to review display: check if Sanity doc exists

stories.title: Seller Review Dashboard
acceptanceCriteria: Create route at src/app/(seller)/seller/my-reviews/page.tsx
Fetch seller's products from Sanity (by seller/grower reference)
Fetch reviews where targetId matches any of seller's product IDs
Display summary stats: average rating, total reviews, recent (last 7 days count)
Rating distribution bar chart (recharts BarChart, 1-5 stars)
Review list with product name, rating, content preview, date
Filter by: specific product (dropdown), rating, date range
Click review opens seller response modal (REVIEW-009)
Pagination: 15 per page
Loading/error/empty states

technicalNotes.productFetch: Query Sanity for products where grower._ref matches current user's grower ID
technicalNotes.reviewFetch: Query Firestore reviews where targetId in sellerProductIds

stories.title: Seller Response System
acceptanceCriteria: Create SellerResponseModal component using shadcn Dialog
Display full review content (read-only) at top of modal
Textarea for seller response (max 500 chars with counter)
Save button stores sellerResponse, sellerResponseDate, sellerRespondedBy in Firestore
Add addSellerResponse(reviewId, sellerId, response) to FirebaseReviewService
Display seller response in FirebaseReviewSection/ReviewCard with 'Seller Response' badge
Allow edit response within 24 hours of posting
Allow delete own response
Toast notifications on success/error
Update FirestoreReview type with sellerResponse, sellerResponseDate, sellerRespondedBy fields

technicalNotes.service: Add to src/lib/firebase/reviews.ts: addSellerResponse(), updateSellerResponse(), deleteSellerResponse()
technicalNotes.display: Update FirebaseReviewSection ReviewCard to show seller response section

stories.title: Grower List Page - Rating Badges
acceptanceCriteria: Fetch review stats for each grower displayed on src/app/grower/page.tsx
Display average rating badge (star icon + number) on each grower card
Show total review count text (e.g., '4.5 (23 reviews)')
If no reviews, show 'No reviews yet' text instead
Click rating links to grower detail page reviews section
Add sort option: 'Highest Rated' to grower list sorting
Optimize: batch fetch review stats for visible growers to reduce Firestore reads
Loading skeleton for rating badges while fetching

technicalNotes.strategy: Create useGrowerRatings(growerIds) hook that batch-fetches stats
technicalNotes.optimization: Cache stats in state, only refetch on page navigation
technicalNotes.note: Grower detail page already has FirebaseReviewSection integrated

stories.title: Product Card - Rating Display
acceptanceCriteria: Add average rating display to ProductCard component
Show star rating + review count below product name (e.g., 4.2 stars (15))
Create useProductRatings(productIds) hook for batch fetching
Display on shop page, category pages, search results, grower product lists
If no reviews, show no rating element (don't show 0 stars)
Compact display that doesn't bloat card size
Loading skeleton placeholder while fetching ratings

technicalNotes.component: Modify existing ProductCard component to accept optional rating props
technicalNotes.pages: Update all pages that render ProductCard to pass rating data

stories.title: Review Email Templates
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/email/templates/review-submitted.tsx - New review alert (to seller)
Create src/lib/email/templates/review-approved.tsx - Review approved (to reviewer)
Create src/lib/email/templates/review-response.tsx - Response added (to reviewer)
Create src/lib/email/templates/review-flagged.tsx - Review flagged (to admin)
All templates use existing EmailLayout component pattern
Include product/grower name, rating stars, review excerpt
Include call-to-action buttons (View Review, View Dashboard)
Mobile-responsive design matching existing order email templates
Include unsubscribe link placeholder

technicalNotes.testing: Verify templates render without errors via unit test

stories.title: Review Email Trigger Service
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/email/review-notifications.ts with email trigger functions
sendNewReviewNotification(review: FirestoreReview) - sends to seller/admin
sendReviewApprovedNotification(review: FirestoreReview) - sends to reviewer
sendResponseNotification(review: FirestoreReview, responder: string) - sends to reviewer
sendFlaggedReviewAlert(review: FirestoreReview) - sends to admin email
Use existing src/lib/email/send-email.ts helper with Gmail SMTP
All sends are fire-and-forget with try/catch error logging
Create API route POST /api/reviews/send-notification for server-side email sending
Integrate triggers: after review create, after moderate, after respond, after flag threshold

technicalNotes.smtp: Use existing EMAIL_HOST, EMAIL_USER, EMAIL_PASSWORD from .env

stories.title: Cloudinary Image Upload for Reviews
acceptanceCriteria: Create ReviewImageUpload component with drag-and-drop zone
Upload images to Cloudinary using NEXT_PUBLIC_CLOUDINARY_CLOUD_NAME and UPLOAD_PRESET
Client-side validation: max 5 images, each < 2MB, types: jpg/png/webp
Show upload progress indicator per image
Preview uploaded images as thumbnails with remove button
Pass Cloudinary URLs array back to ReviewForm via onChange callback
Integrate into ReviewForm below content textarea
Store Cloudinary URLs in Firestore images field on review create/update
Error handling: show toast on upload failure with retry option

stories.title: Review Image Display and Lightbox
acceptanceCriteria: Display image thumbnails in review cards (grid layout, max 3 visible)
Show '+X more' badge if more than 3 images
Click thumbnail opens lightbox modal (shadcn Dialog + next/image)
Lightbox: prev/next navigation, image counter (1 of 5), close button
Lazy load images with next/image component for optimization
Alt text for accessibility on all images
Mobile responsive: thumbnails stack on small screens

technicalNotes.lightbox: Build with shadcn Dialog + next/image (no extra library needed)
technicalNotes.integration: Update FirebaseReviewSection review card rendering to include gallery

stories.title: Advanced Review Filtering and Sorting
acceptanceCriteria: Enhance FirebaseReviewSection with filter bar above review list
Sort options: Most Recent, Highest Rated, Lowest Rated, Most Helpful
Filter checkboxes: Verified Purchase Only, Has Images Only
Star filter: clickable star bars in rating summary (click 4-star bar shows only 4-star reviews)
Keyword search input for searching within review content (client-side filter)
Show active filter count badge and Clear All button
Filters combine with AND logic
Persist sort preference in localStorage
All filtering is client-side (reviews already loaded via onSnapshot)

technicalNotes.note: FirebaseReviewSection already has sortBy state - extend it with filters
technicalNotes.clientSide: All filtering is client-side from the reviews array, no new Firestore queries needed

stories.title: Verified Purchase Validation
acceptanceCriteria: Create API route GET /api/reviews/verify-purchase?userId=X&productId=Y
Query backend /orders endpoint for user's delivered orders
Check if any order contains the specific productId
Return { verified: boolean }
Call verify-purchase API when user submits a review
Auto-set verifiedPurchase: true in Firestore if validated
Display green checkmark + 'Verified Purchase' badge in review cards
Admin can manually toggle verification status in moderation modal

stories.title: Helpful Voting UI Enhancement
acceptanceCriteria: Add 'Was this helpful?' section below each review in FirebaseReviewSection
Show thumbs-up button with count, visual state change when voted
Optimistic UI: immediately update count before Firestore confirms
Prevent voting on own review
Show '23 people found this helpful' text, or 'Be the first to find this helpful'
Authenticated users only - show sign-in prompt for guests
toggleHelpfulVote already implemented in Firebase service - just add UI

technicalNotes.component: Update review card in FirebaseReviewSection to show helpful voting UI
technicalNotes.existing: The backend logic exists, this story is purely UI integration

stories.title: Review Analytics Dashboard
acceptanceCriteria: Create route at src/app/(seller)/seller/analytics/reviews/page.tsx
Summary cards: Total Reviews, Average Rating, Verified Purchase %, Response Rate
Chart 1: Rating distribution (BarChart, 1-5 stars with counts)
Chart 2: Review volume over time (LineChart, last 6 months by week)
Chart 3: Average rating trend over time (LineChart)
Table: Top 5 highest-rated products, Top 5 lowest-rated products
Table: Products with most reviews
Date range picker to filter analytics data
Export to CSV button (download review data as CSV file)
Loading states for charts while data aggregates

technicalNotes.data: Aggregate from all Firestore reviews, group by month/week for trends
technicalNotes.csv: Generate CSV string and trigger download via Blob URL

stories.title: Seller Review Insights
acceptanceCriteria: Add Insights tab to seller review dashboard (my-reviews page)
Chart: Rating trend for seller's products (last 3 months)
Chart: Rating distribution per product (horizontal bar chart)
Top keywords from reviews (simple word frequency, exclude common words)
Alert: Products with declining ratings (red badge if avg dropped > 0.5 in 30 days)
Comparison: Seller's average vs overall platform average
Mobile responsive charts

technicalNotes.keywords: Simple word frequency analysis - split content, filter stopwords, count occurrences

Test coverage >= 85% for all new review-related files

technicalNotes.mockPattern: Follow jest.setupMocks.js Firebase mock pattern from progress.txt

stories.title: Documentation and Progress Update
acceptanceCriteria: Append all new codebase patterns to progress.txt Codebase Patterns section
Document: Admin moderation flow pattern
Document: Sanity-Firebase sync pattern
Document: Seller response pattern
Document: Email notification trigger pattern

Update .github/REVIEW_RATING_SYSTEM_MASTER_PLAN.md status to COMPLETE
Final build validation: npm run build passes

technicalNotes.progressTxt: Append each implementation summary with files changed, patterns learned
technicalNotes.masterPlan: Update all Phase checkboxes to [x] and status to Complete

technicalDecisions.database: Firebase Firestore (primary user-facing) + Sanity CMS (admin moderation via sync)
technicalDecisions.sync: Bidirectional via Next.js API routes, last-write-wins conflict resolution
technicalDecisions.auth: Firebase Auth UID for review ownership, useAuth() for role-based access
technicalDecisions.email: Gmail SMTP via nodemailer + @react-email/components templates (ALREADY INSTALLED)
technicalDecisions.realtime: Firestore onSnapshot for dashboard updates (existing pattern in useFirebaseReviews)
technicalDecisions.charts: recharts (ALREADY INSTALLED) for all analytics dashboards
technicalDecisions.state: Custom hooks (useReviewModeration, useFirebaseReviews) with React state
technicalDecisions.testing: Jest + RTL for unit tests, following jest.setupMocks.js Firebase mock pattern
technicalDecisions.security: SANITY_API_WRITE_TOKEN server-side only in API routes, never client-side

qualityGates.tests: npm run test - all passing (existing 1478 + new tests)

rollbackPlan.phase1: Revert admin dashboard pages, keep existing review display unchanged
rollbackPlan.phase2: Disable sync API routes, Firestore remains source of truth
rollbackPlan.phase3: Hide seller response UI, data stays intact in Firestore
rollbackPlan.emergency: Feature flag NEXT_PUBLIC_REVIEWS_ENABLED=false to disable review submission

phaseExecutionOrder.note: Ralph should execute phases in priority order. Within a phase, follow story dependency order.
phases: Phase 1: Admin Moderation Backend + Dashboard (REVIEW-001 through REVIEW-004) - HIGHEST PRIORITY
Phase 4: Rating Integration Across Pages (REVIEW-010, REVIEW-011)
Phase 9: Testing and Polish (REVIEW-021, REVIEW-022) - FINAL
